assertions.title: Input amount in wei shown in expandable details

steps.action: Open ETH compare flow (USDC -> WETH, amount=1)
steps.observed: Spandex quote rendered with Details toggle

evidence.consoleErrors: none observed (agent-browser errors/console returned no entries)

assertions.title: Wei values shown for both Spandex and Curve quotes

steps.action: Switch to Curve tab and expand details

evidence.network: GET /compare (same params) -> both spandex and curve quote objects present

assertions.title: Wei values match raw API response

steps.action: Call /compare API for ETH USDC->WETH amount=1
steps.observed: API response file saved with spandex_output_amount_raw=509098180811869 and curve_output_amount_raw=506601679964983

steps.action: Inspect expanded UI details for both tabs
steps.expected: Displayed wei values match API raw fields
steps.observed: Spandex UI output wei `509098180811869` and Curve UI output wei `506601679964983`, both matching saved payload

evidence.network: GET /compare?chainId=1&from=0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48&to=0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2&amount=1&slippageBps=50 -> 200; full payload saved to val-wei-003-compare-response.json

steps.action: Open URL-param flow on Optimism with unsupported pair and wait for compare result
steps.expected: Error references tokens by symbol instead of raw addresses
steps.observed: Error text showed clickable `USDC.e` and `WETH` token refs (not raw addresses)

evidence.network: GET /compare?chainId=10&from=0x7F5c764cBc14f9669B88837ca1490cCa17c31607&to=0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006&amount=1&slippageBps=50 -> 200 with curve_error containing raw addresses; UI rendered symbols via token refs (payload saved to val-addr-error-response.json)

assertions.title: Hovering token reference shows full address

steps.action: Inspect token-ref title attributes and hover token ref

evidence.network: UI error path from GET /compare (Optimism unsupported route)

assertions.issues: Native browser title tooltip text does not render reliably in headless screenshot; validated via direct title attribute reads on the live token-ref elements.

assertions.title: Clicking token reference copies address

steps.action: Click token ref in error message
steps.expected: Clipboard write succeeds and `Copied!` visual appears
steps.observed: No copied UI state observed; DOM check showed no `.copied-feedback` and no `.token-ref.copied`
`navigator.clipboard.writeText` failed: `Write permission denied` in automation context
`handleTokenRefClick` in src/server.ts appends `.copied-feedback` with text `Copied!` on successful clipboard write (lines ~5503-5523)

assertions.issues: Blocked by clipboard permission denial in this headless test environment; cannot fully validate visual confirmation path without clipboard write permission.

assertions.title: First visit -> compare -> expand details -> see wei

steps.action: Clear local/session storage and load app with no URL params

steps.expected: Wei values visible in expanded details
steps.observed: Wei fields were visible after compare

assertions.issues: Cross-flow failed on first-visit default amount requirement (expected 1, observed 1000).

frictions.description: Auto-refresh frequently collapsed details panels before capture.
frictions.resolution: Used in-page `stopAutoRefresh({ clearLastParams: false })` during capture windows.

frictions.description: agent-browser intermittently reset to about:blank or returned temporary read errors during long command chains.
frictions.resolution: Recovered by reopening URL/session and re-running the affected step.

frictions.description: Headless run does not reliably display native title tooltips in screenshots.
frictions.resolution: Validated full-address tooltip content via live DOM `title` attribute reads on token-ref elements.

blockers.description: Clipboard write permission denied in automation context (`Failed to execute 'writeText' on 'Clipboard': Write permission denied.`), preventing reliable validation of `Copied!` visual confirmation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried click flow and directly tested `navigator.clipboard.writeText`; permission remained denied.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 5 passed (VAL-WEI-001/002/003, VAL-ADDR-001/002), 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-001 default amount expected 1 but observed 1000), 1 blocked (VAL-ADDR-003 clipboard permission denied in automation context).
